div.head: 97. Editorial Note
div.p: On September 24 Secretary Herter and Under Secretary Dillon met with Foreign Minister Fujiyama and Ambassador Asakai in Washington. Assistant Secretary of Defense Irwin also participated in the meeting, at which there was general discussion of the security treaty negotiations, the current international situation, GARIOA, trade issues, and the Algerian situation. Text of the memorandum of conversation by Richard L. Sneider, Officer in Charge of Japanese Affairs, is in the Supplement.
